creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192178
py-ripe.atlas.cousteau-1.4.2_and_unbreak.patch

The attached patch updates the Python package py-ripe.atlas.cousteau to 1.4.2 and unbreaks it.

Following changes were made to the port:
- changed PORTVERSION to DISTVERSION
- fixed and sorted RUN_DEPENDS
- sorted USE_PYTHON
- add a more precise description for pkg-descr

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
